hero.quote: "Skilled in API integration, scalable UI architecture, and delivering user-centric software solutions."

about.title:
Academic Precision
Meets Practical Development
about.degree: Bachelor of Science in Geo-Informatics (Computer Science), College of Computing
paragraphs: Full-stack Developer with practical experience in building responsive web applications using Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Skilled in API integration, scalable UI architecture, and delivering user-centric software solutions.

My background in Geo-Informatics provides a unique perspective on spatial data management and complex system architecture, allowing me to bridge the gap between technical GIS requirements and modern web standards.

achievements: Performed black-box API testing via Postman for data mapping.
Built responsive, scalable UIs with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Storybook using design tokens.
Implemented in-app camera restriction for the Azolla App to prevent retrospective uploads.
Conducted Pre-UAT for ERP modules and created technical user manuals guide.
Designed and implemented relational database schemas using Navicat.
Developed efficient RESTful APIs using Go (Golang) to handle business logic.
Conducted API testing via Postman to ensure pre-deployment stability.
Performed Code Review & Project Management via Git Version Control in GitLab.

projects.title: Technical Portfolio
projects.description: A selection of projects that demonstrate expertise in full-stack architecture, API design, and modern frontend technologies.

items.title: Geospatial API Services
items.description: Backend infrastructure for Surveying data, featuring complex SQL queries and robust Go handlers developed during One Geo Survey internship.

items.title: Azolla App UI System
items.description: A design-token based UI library and ERP module frontend built during Arctic Carbon Tech internship with high focus on responsiveness.
